examples.title: CYK Algorithm
examples.description: Membership testing for CFG in CNF
examples.code:
ALGORITHM CYK(sentence, grammar)
BEGIN
  n = length(sentence)
  INIT table[n][n]
  FILL diagonal with A where A→word
  FOR length=2 TO n
    FOR i=0 TO n-length
      j = i + length
      FOR k=i+1 TO j-1
        IF ∃ A→BC where B∈table[i][k] and C∈table[k][j]
          ADD A to table[i][j]
  RETURN S ∈ table[0][n-1]
END
examples.explanation: Builds table of possible non-terminals for substrings
